title: Easy Tender Mediterranean Lamb Tagine
description: A buttery, tender, and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring lamb, Thai red curry paste, and lardons, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This dish is cooked to perfection in a claypot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large claypot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the diced lardons and cook until crispy, then remove from the pot.
Add the lamb pieces to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the Thai red curry paste to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth, dried apricots, prunes, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Cover the claypot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the cooked lardons.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
